name: checkov per-rule options provided in the single config project to a native .checkov.yaml file
command: p=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool checkov --options '{"soft-fail-on":["LOW"],"skip-check":["CKV_AWS_20"]}' --out . 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$p" ] && grep -q 'soft-fail-on' "$p" && grep -q 'CKV_AWS_20' "$p" && echo checkov-projects 1>&2
